role: Desktop-specific layout component that composes the top chrome, decisions bar, main stage with side strata, and bottom transport for the surface interface.
capabilities: Positions top chrome with left parameter chips and right global toggles
Shows the pending DecisionsBar entry below the header
Arranges the main stage as left legend, central wheel/state, and right detail panel or select hint
Renders the temporal Scrubber and selected-sequence Tether
Wires SurfaceState actions into chrome and detail-panel controls
substance_why: It concretely composes real controls such as LensChip, SpaceChip, LayerChip, ResChip, QuantChip, CentreChip, LiveDot, ViewToggle, Settings, Legend, WheelOrState, Disclosure, Scrubber, and Tether, binding their callbacks to SurfaceState actions.
interactions_present: Pick projection/lens binding via LensChip onPick
Toggle live mode via LiveDot setLive
Dismiss selected point via Disclosure onDismiss
interactions_missing: DecisionsBar is mounted without props, so its actions are not wired at this seam
SelectHint has no click/tap action to create a selection
Tether is display-only with no user interaction
No keyboard shortcuts or strata resize/collapse controls
WheelOrState interactions are opaque at this file level
performance_risks: Whole layout re-renders on any SurfaceState change with no memoization
Entire SurfaceState object is passed to many children, potentially triggering expensive downstream re-renders
WheelOrState and Legend receive the full state and may re-render for unrelated changes
reuse_why: The desktop chrome/stage/transport structure and its control set are domain concepts worth preserving, but the inline layout and styling should be rebuilt for the redesign.
decomposition_hints: Extract a TopBar/Chrome component from the header composition
Extract a Stage component grouping left strata, center, and right strata
Extract a Transport/Footer component for DecisionsBar, Scrubber, and Tether
Move inline stamp annotations into layout primitives if retained
Separate the right-strata detail panel (Disclosure/SelectHint) into its own component
